message:
Fix edge cases in idempotency expiration and chart scaling

Idempotency middleware:
- Change expiration check from < to <= in pruneExpiredRecords()
- Records expiring at exactly the current time are now pruned
- Prevents off-by-one where record at exact expiry survives one cycle

CostForecastChart / CostTrendChart:
- Fix division by zero when dailyForecasts has only 1 element
- Use (length > 1 ? length - 1 : 1) as denominator
- Prevents NaN/Infinity when charting single data point
- Affects both data point positioning and tooltip positioning

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
